/*//

*///
xps.1.1  ; Xbox pixel shader version 1.1



#define NORMAL t0
#define NORMAL_bx2 t0_bx2
#define DIFFUSE t1

#define light_ts v0
#define light_ts_bx2 v0_bx2
#define view_ts v1

#define CB_LIGHT_COLOR c0
#define CB_AMBIENT_COLOR c1

;mov r0, v0
;xfc zero, zero, r0_sat, zero, zero, zero, r0.a


  ;float3 NORMAL = tex2D(sNormal, IN.uv).xyz;
  ;NORMAL = normalize(NORMAL * 2.0f - 1.0f);
      tex NORMAL ; use _bx2 to convert from [0,1] to [-1,1]
  
  ;float3 albedo = tex2D(DIFFUSE, IN.uv).rgb;
      tex DIFFUSE
  
  ;float3 L = normalize(IN.light_ts);
  ;float ndotl = saturate(dot(n, L));
      dp3 r0, NORMAL_bx2, light_ts_bx2
      xfc zero, zero, r0_sat, zero, zero, zero, r0.a

;   ;float3 diffuse  = albedo * CB_LIGHT_COLOR * ndotl;
;       mul r0, DIFFUSE, r0_sat
;       mul r0, r0, CB_LIGHT_COLOR
;   
;   ;float3 color = CB_AMBIENT_COLOR * albedo + DIFFUSE; // + specular;
;       mul DIFFUSE, DIFFUSE, CB_AMBIENT_COLOR
;       add r0, DIFFUSE, r0
    

    
;float  uSpecPower;
;float  uSpecIntensity;

                ;float3 V = normalize(IN.viewTS);
                ;float3 H = normalize(L + V);
                ;float ndoth = saturate(dot(n, H));
                ;float3 specular = CB_LIGHT_COLOR * pow(ndoth, uSpecPower) * uSpecIntensity;
